programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace un año Diana conoció en una red social a Juan Manuel, sin embargo, nunca se han visto, ni han hablado por videollamadas. El día en el que se iban a conocer en persona, Juan Manuel tuvo un accidente de tránsito y perdió la vida.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Alejandra tiene una relación en línea hace tres años con Andrés David. Ambos viven en la misma ciudad pero hasta el día de hoy no se han conocido en persona ni por videollamadas.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Samuel lleva ya siete meses hablando en línea con Marina. En un comienzo ambos descubrieron que compartían muchos gustos en común, pero Samuel encontraba sospechosas todas las excusas que daba Marina a la hora de conocerse.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace tres años que Henry mantiene una relación en línea con Alejandra. A lo largo de los años ambos han estado hablando en línea y Henry cree que ella es la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Let, Haexa y Vaski reciben a Apolo, el ex de Leticia. Vaski es quien toma el pelo a la novata. Ortega se debate entre Camila y Mariana y JV no puede decidirse entre Mari A y Leticia, lo que culmina en una gran bronca tras la Pool Party.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Abelha y Julio tienen una cita, Hadad es eliminado. Una pelea entre Ortega y Julienne sacude la casa. Ortega, Haeixa, Gab y Angietta se besan mucho en una aventura que acaba en desnudez. La tableta de regalos Deja la suite principal, ella elige a Julio.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Unraveling the clues to a series of suspicious deaths, Matlock uncovers a greedy extortion business that’s turned quite nasty. Ben and Leanne are drawn into a case of three accidental deaths.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock and his daughter Leanne discover that extortion is the key to three accidental deaths. involving young women who make it a business of crying rape.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock recalls in flashbacks the racially tense 1960’s. At the time, he was a defense attorney representing African-American Cyrus Jordan – a talented cook charged with murdering the bullying white sheriff.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Legendary Milton Berle guest stars as Harvey Chase, an old-time comedian who calls upon his fan and friend Ben Matlock when he’s accused of murdering a popular, but foul-mouthed performer who’d been called in to replace him.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Molly, Gil and the Guppies celebrate summer with lots of outdoor fun; Gil uses his camping skills to rescue Bubble Puppy during the Summer Camp Games.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Molly and Gil find a lost kitten named Bubble Kitty, they help take the cat home to Meownt Rushmore.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Wally's special friend, Walinda, gets tangled in an anchor chain; Cap'n Turbot and his cousin are in the middle of an archaeological dig when the cliff they are on collapses all around them.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Everest gets sprayed by a skunk, the pups tell her delicately that she needs a bath; the pups fly north to help free a baby whale that is trapped under the ice.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend find his lost parrot; the PAW Patrol discovers a beehive in Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old, brass jack-in-the-box with a genie inside who grants him three wishes; Francois Turbot prepares to walk a tightrope between the top of the bridge and the lookout tower.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger escapes with Cap'n Turbot's performing penguins right before the Adventure Bay Snow Show, Tracker and the PAW Patrol must get them back.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Mail carrier Molly tries to deliver a Friendship Day card for someone named Alison in a place called Wonderland; the card-stealing Queen of Hearts bans Friendship Day across the land.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: A veterinarian takes care of Bubble Puppy when he has a cold.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Guppies must follow an egg trail to find the mysterious Oyster Bunny.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Mr. Grouper's van gets stuck in the holiday snow, Mr. Claws and his horse, Snowflake, come to the rescue.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: When Mr. Grumpfish turns up in Happy Junction, he makes everyone in town really grumpy; Sheriff Molly must find a way to help everyone handle their tricky emotions.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: On the U.S.S. Recycler, Captain Deema and her crew strive to leave every planet cleaner than they found it; However, their mission is put to the test when a crew of messy Litterbugs, led by the evil Garbage Khan, take over their ship.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Ice cream sellers Molly and Gil are trying to deliver ice cream to a water park on the other side of a hot desert before it melts and without getting caught by the Rattlers.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: When a masked fish is causing trouble for Goldie's magnum opus, Detective Baby Shark and William Watson must catch the culprit before opening night; when Vigo and Costello enter a game show to win an evil prize, Super Shark and Captain Kelp sign up.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: The Tentacools get caught up in the trappings of being rock starfishes; when Hank discovers his friends are going easy on him during dodge bubble, he sets out to become a tough fishy just like Shadow.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: When an underwater storm rains on Baby Shark and William's fun, they doubt whether they can have an adventure indoors; William and Vola enter a young scientist contest and their competitive spirit gets them into a sticky situation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy; SpongeBob and Squidward go to the Kelpy G concert.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally destroy Sandy's air supply and have to help her find more oxygen; SpongeBob wants to earn his belt from karate master Fuzzy Acorns with Sandy's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty with disastrous results; SpongeBob creates a buddy out of bubbles when none of his friends have time to play with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward issues a restraining order against SpongeBob; Plankton mistakenly believes that a piece of art is a stolen krabby patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward has trouble recalling his happiest memory; SpongeBob and Sandy must defeat an evil Jellien overlord who has replaced everyone with clones.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free food to win back customers; SpongeBob needs all of his friends to help him remodel his pineapple home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton replaces his computer wife with a new version; SpongeBob asks Patrick to help him fall asleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make a bet to see who can hold a funny face the longest; SpongeBob and Patrick spend a day at Glove World before it closes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob brings home a box of new snail treats for Gary; when Plankton wins a free krabby patty, Mr. Krabs tries to keep him from collecting his prize.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob inadvertently helps Plankton get all the citizens of Bikini Bottom on Santa's naughty list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then the world.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go on an advertising blitz to drum up business for the Krusty Krab; Mr. Krabs and Plankton circulate petitions about the bulldozing of a Bikini Bottom restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to manage SpongeBob and Squidward's world tour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join an extreme sports team; Sandy finds a book of world records and proceeds to try to break them all.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick becomes a superhero and plans to clean up Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob must take drastic measures when Gary becomes obsessed with his new red ball.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is forced to go back to the milkshake academy when he learns that his milkshake license has expired; SpongeBob and Patrick must take care of Squidward when he reverts to being a baby.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob fails his driving test, forcing Mrs Puff to think outside the box and off the road.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab; Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While in prison, Plankton teams up with his fellow inmates to break out of jail and steal the secret Krabby Patty formula; SpongeBob replaces his broken spatula with one from Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A giant purple ball of goo rises from the deep and threatens to release its toxic, gooey wrath all over the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must save Mr. Krabs when he gets trapped in the bank; Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up after failing to steal the krabby patty recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go to see a horror film; SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn a long-lost sandwich recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is desperate to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat; Mr. Krabs tries to scare Squidward into working harder.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob to save money; SpongeBob tries to get back to work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob fails his driver's test again, Mr. Krabs decides to teach him how to drive; SpongeBob gets lost while trying to take a shortcut to work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him; while trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast-paced world of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton hosts his own picnic on the same day; Mr. Krabs tells SpongeBob tales from his old navy days.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When stray snails begin appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself; Patrick enters a krabby patty eating competition in order to defend Bikini Bottom's honor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him; after accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs' safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, they change his life in unexpected ways; when Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick's behavioral patterns, her science experiment goes awry; after following Plankton's advice, Mr. Krabs decides to marry the only thing he as ever loved - money.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that is hiring is the lamest store at the mall; SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln va a su primer concierto de rock junto a Luna, quien está decidida a hacerle pasar un momento inolvidable; cuando Lincoln encuentrra un sobre en el ático cree que se trata de un fajo de billetes oculto por alguien de la casa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln entrena a Lana para que sustituya a Lola en un concurso, ya que Lola está enferma; Lincoln y Clyde creen que será sencillo hacer de niñeros de Lilly, pero no lo es.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene las manos ocupadas cuando sus diez hermanas le piden cubrirlas en el mismo día; Bobby y Lori van en una cita doble con Lincoln y la pequeña hermana de Bobby, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln comienza a pasar mucho tiempo en casa de Clyde, porque el padre de éste le presta más atención que su propio padre; Lincoln se monta en una limosina, y después de haber probado el sabor de la buena vida, su actitud cambia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia de Lincoln forma una banda cuando él se inscribe para un concurso de talentos; la madre de Lincoln le ofrece llevarlo a la oficina dental en la que ella trabaja, mientras que sus hermanas van a trabajar con su padre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes, Luan gasta bromas a toda la casa, pero Lincoln este año tiene un plan para evitar caer en ellas; los hermanos Loud van juntos al supermercado a hacer la compra para su mamá, pero Lincoln tiene un plan alternativo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde tienen que empezar un negocio, como parte de una tarea escolar, así que comienzan a ganar dinero con la experiencia de Lincoln tratando con chicas; los miembros de la familia Loud se venden los unos a los otros en una subasta.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde van de acampada para recuperar su hombría perdida; Lincoln consigue a Lori un empleo en una sala de videojuegos que además es pizzería, pero Lori se mete en problemas cuando Lincoln comienza a pedirle favores.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Aunque su madre le obliga, Lincoln no quiere jugar al fútbol americano, pero él tiene un plan para que Lynn lo sustituya; Licoln se vuelve un hipocondríaco después de que Lucy le augure que su día terminará en un desastre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln accidentalmente le arreglan cuatro citas para el baile Sadie Hawkins en la escuela; cuando Lincoln y Bobby se hacen amigos, Lori se dispone a poner a Bobby celoso pasando el tiempo con Clyde.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln desearía tener diez hermanos en lugar de diez hermanas, pero Lisa le abre los ojos y le enseña cuál es la realidad; Lola quiere formar parte de un club secreto de hermanos, pero sus hermanos no son tan partidarios.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln empieza a acaparar la atención cuando se convierte en asistente de Luan; los ruidosos niños se divierten en un día nevado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln se enamoran de su nuevo profesor particular, por lo que él no puede estudiar; los niños se quejan de su casa, pero cuando un tornado la destruye, cambian de manera de pensar.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde hacen una pasantia donde Flip, obteniendo el título de gerentes; Lincoln, preocupado por lo aburrida que se ha vuelto la vida diaria del abuelo, lo lleva afuera para pasar juntos una jornada memorable.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde le pide consejo a Lincoln sobre cómo ser un buen hermano mayor porque se ha enterado de que sus padres van a tener otro hijo; Lori y Leni han comprado dos vestidos idénticos, lo que origina una discusión tremenda en casa de los Loud.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cuando los Laud ganan un viaje a un complejo, deciden llevar a sus hijos con ellos porque estos prometieron comportarse; cuando Lucy se enamora de un chico normal y corriente, su hermana decide cambiarle el look.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La posición social de Lincoln está en juego cuando su hermana de 4 años de edad entra en su clase de quinto grado; los niños se cansan de que la camioneta familiar se malogre, por lo que deciden tratar de engañar a papá para que compre una nueva.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lola y Lana quieren ser scouts, pero se dan cuenta de que una está más capacitada que la otra para lograrlo; Lincoln y Clyde creen que Bobby está engañando a Lori, por lo que lo siguen a todos lados para recabar pruebas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Papá se enfada con los niños porque nunca cierran la puerta principal de la vivienda, por lo que decide tomar medidas para asegurar que la vivienda esté protegida; Lincoln borra sin querer sus fotos de infancia y Clyde y él intentan recrearlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas creen que Lincoln da mala suerte y le prohíben asistir a sus actividades o colaborar en ellas; cuando Lincoln descubre que en su clase se va a diseccionar ranas, Lana y él emprenden una misión para rescatarlas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los planes de descanso de primavera de Lincoln y Clyde se ponen en peligro cuando sólo tienen un día para completar su lista; Lori lanza una fiesta sofisticada, pero resulta contraproducente cuando a sus invitados no les gusta lo que había planeado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Cansados de comer siempre lo mismo, los niños preparan un sabotaje para poder cenar pizza; Lincoln y Ronnie Anne tienen que cuidar un huevo, pero Lincoln no confía en ella.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde participan en un concurso de cómics para conocer a uno de sus ídolos, pero se llevan una sorpresa poco agradable. Lana trae una nueva mascota a casa y todos la adoran, pero las cuatro mascotas de los Loud confabulan en su contra.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Los niños oyen a Lily decir groserías y les preocupa estar siendo una mala influencia para ella; llega una carta de amor dirigida a "L", y la familia está intrigada por saber para quién va exactamente.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Bobby van a la ciudad para visitar a su numerosa familia que es alocada y caótica. Después de ver lo bien que los niños están ahí, la mamá de Ronnie Anne admite que quiere mudarse con su familia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde quieren ser recordados por siempre en la escuela, por ello se proponen colarse en las fotografías de todos los grupos; Lincoln sugiere a sus hermanas que se sometan a un test de compatibilidad porque están siempre discutiendo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Clyde está preocupado porque Lincoln está triste y trata de animarlo; Lucy utiliza un libro de hechizos para darles a sus hermanos una lección.

programme.desc: Tony experiences the building boom that has taken place in Dubai.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for 6 years and they have 2 children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trisha suspects her boyfriend Ernie of drugging her for an even darker reason! Then, can Jessica finally get the help she needs on Steve's stage?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After Cassarah became Tim's live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers' parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A married mother of six says she is done with her husband and is in love with a 17-year-old boy; Shyaina says her best friend's boyfriend made advances and touched her behind her friend's back.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m 14 and I Want a Baby
programme.desc: Shalonda is here to tell her mother, Shondra and Steve that she’s ready to have a baby!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He's accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At 13 years old, Meghan had issues with alcohol and is now into harder drugs. Then, Raven claims she lost her virginity to Joe and hasn't slept with anyone else, but Joe has heard rumors that he's not the only person she slept with.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steven wants to prove to his wife Stephanie that he is not gay and has never cheated on her with a man. Then, Tiaha doubts Jamal's fidelity because he stays out late and is distant. What shocking truths will their lie detector tests reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Melody believes her boyfriend Glenn hired Marra to wash cars in a bikini and sleep with him. Glenn suspects Melody hasn't been faithful too. Plus, Dani isn't sure if her boyfriend Robert slept with her sister.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tonya wants to tell her man that she's pregnant and cheating with her transsexual roommate, Gina! Mike has been sleeping with his fiancé’s cousin for a year! Then, Jimmy has a pregnant fiancé AND girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The truth comes out on today's Jerry Springer Show! Michelle tells her lover David that she's really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex-girlfriend back from her new lover Tom.

programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La policía va siguiendo a Karina. Rosaura le dice que se detenga pero ella no quiere y se estrellan. Luis Mario le dice a Eva que se va a casar para llevarle la contraria a Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le pide a Rosaura que se case con él y ella acepta. María Julia le da los últimos detalles a Karina para presentarla ante doña Cruz. Caridad recrimina a Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva se ponen de acuerdo para hacerle la vida imposible a Rosaura una vez que llegue a la casa. Panchita se les une. Luis Mario sigue pensando en Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia llama a Luis Mario para oír su voz. Su plan es que cuando se canse de Patricio, volverá con Luis Mario porque sigue siendo su esposo. Luisana está llorando desesperada.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia les dice que ahora menos que nunca cree en Karina, por no querer hacerse la prueba de ir con el chisme de doña Cruz. Samuel está con Claudia y tampoco cree en Karina y María Julia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Eva para comentarle un nuevo plan contra Rosaura y con la ayuda de Valeria. Valeria acepta provocar a Luis Mario y besarlo para provocar a Rosaura el día de la fiesta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le suplica a Luis Mario que no la deje. Pero el está decidido a divorciarse. Gabriel le dice a Panchita que le diga señora a Rosaura y manda a Jimena a calmar los ánimos de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura está llorando y llama a Luis Mario. Luis Mario regresa con Rosaura, pero como no está piensa que se fue para la casa de su papá. Eduarda le cuenta a Luisana lo que hizo con Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura va a la playa y ve a Luis Mario jugando con Eva. Patricio y Camelia tienen otro altercado. Él la amenaza con su estado de bígama. Rosaura se va llorando para la casa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le reclama a Rosaura por haber salido con Bruno, pero al final le dice que puede hacerlo porque él confía en ella. Eva le da dos cachetadas a Gabriel porque la besó.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel la necesidad que tiene de alejarse para siempre de Rosaura para no seguir haciéndole daño porque sabe que no la ama y nunca podrá.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Rosaura llega al aeropuerto ve a Eva besando a Luis Mario y termina desmayándose en el camino, mientras que Bruno corre como loco por todo el lugar buscándola.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda, ayudada por Panchita, busca el collar de perlas negras con el cual piensa enviar presa a Rosaura, mientras que Luis Mario le escribe una carta a Rosaura, en la cual vuelve a pedirle perdón.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se niega a considerar la posibilidad de que Rosaura esté esperando un hijo suyo, como le sugiere Gabriel.

programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are ready for Halloween when a 19th century vampire killing kit stakes out the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Come party with the Pawn Stars as they prepare the ultimate gift for the Old Man's 70th birthday, a fully rebuilt 1957 Chevy 150.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While hunting for collectibles in Central Iowa, Mike and Frank meet 88-year-old WWII veteran Leland and buy the Japanese sword he brought back from the war.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Flying solo in Northern Iowa, Mike comes across the "Goat Man" and combs through his amazing, hidden-away property of junk-filled fields and buses. An Illinois couple's home proves to be a collector's paradise.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank spot a White Castle burger joint on an Ohio farmer's front lawn and discover his extraordinary collection of vintage buildings and vehicles.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank stumble upon a potential mega-pick in Northeast Iowa, but will it yield any treasures? Danielle has a lead on a rare, 15-gallon antique gas pump.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Donkeys and Dollars
programme.desc: Settle in for some southern hospitality as the Cajun Pawn Stars encounter everything from donkeys to getaway cars. Meanwhile, Jimmie places a bid on the most expensive item to ever breeze through his doors.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Come spin up some excitement with the Cajun Pawn Stars. The team checks out a rare first album by musical legend Jerry Lee Lewis, and later come across a mischievous pygmy goat for sale.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shoeshine Mike
programme.desc: In the southern United States, roots run deep and the region's rich history is full of treasures. The team uncovers some of these amazing gems.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Joker's Big Score
programme.desc: Jimmie looks over a classic police car, while Joker stumbles upon a profitable piece.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Trick or Trade

programme.desc: The guys check out a Greyhound bus rumored to have belonged to country music legend Barbara Madrell. Then they find out if a flintlock gun was really brought to Louisiana by pirates.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Speed Demons

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike's hurt his back but can't afford time off to recuperate. The guys dive into a 92-year-old Iowa farmer's unbelievable collection but make a huge mistake in the process.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Roger Moore as agent 007 teams with a beautiful Soviet agent (Barbara Bach) to battle Stromberg (Curt Jurgens) in order to save the world from total annihilation and a 315-pound villian, "Jaws" (Richard Kiel).

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Roger Moore, in his fourth role as Agent 007, is sent to outer space to protect Britain and the world from a madman who would destroy the earth in this pulse-pounding, out-of-this-universe adventure.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: Roger Moore as the formidable James Bond takes on the dangerous task of locating a top secret device that lies precariously in the waters off the beautiful Greek coast in this breathtaking action thriller.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Desde una emocionante persecución en jet hasta una cuenta regresiva de un desastre nuclear, James Bond vuelve en una electrizante aventura que nos lleva al límite del estremecimiento con emoción incesante.

programme.title: En la mira de los asesinos
programme.desc: Roger Moore llena la pantalla de humor, elegancia y encanto. Bond se enfrenta a Max Zorin (Christopher Walken), quien busca controlar el mercado de microchips, incluso si significa matar a millones para lograrlo.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Licencia para matar
programme.desc: James Bond se lanza en su aventura más apasionada -- no por su país, no por la justicia, sino por venganza personal. Timothy Dalton aporta urgencia, encanto y determinación mortal en su papel como el agente 007.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Goddess of War Athena was the wisest, most level-headed and rational deity. She was born out of Zeus’ skull, wearing a helmet and holding a spear.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: ¡ALTO! Frontera

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Heloise posts an embarrassing video of Lucius on 'Spew Tube', it's up to Jimmy to restore the evil leader's bad reputation. --- Heloise breaks out the body swapper to get some sweet revenge after Beezy and Cerbee crash her picnic with Jimmy.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius jacks up the heat into record-breaking levels, Jimmy infuriates him by throwing a beach party. --- When Lucius bans the use of cell phones in Miseryville, Jimmy turns to Dr. Scientist to help cure Beezy‘s mobile-mania.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise’s supposedly miserable new invention turns out to be a carnival. --- In order to score tickets to see ‘Runny and the Nosebleeds’, Beezy and Jimmy get jobs babysitting the Molotov’s bratty kids.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts beating Lucius at Golf, Samy and Heloise must intervene before Lucius floods the whole town. --- Jimmy plays matchmaker to find Beezy a date to Lucius' statue-unveiling ceremony.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy’s new catchphrase launches him into superstardom, and Lucius wants in. --- When Lucius fires Heloise, Jimmy makes her a list of all the fun things she can do with her free time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius and Beezy start fighting more than ever, Jimmy unfreezes Heniouses One through Six for a rift-healing reunion. --- When Jimmy and Beezy take over the kitchen at ‘Chez Garbage,’ guess who ends up doing all the work.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy tells Heloise about the magic of snow, she sees an opportunity to infuriate Lucius. --- Jimmy defends the adorable but evil Weavils when their habitat is threatened by Lucius’ construction plans.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lost in Clownburg, Jimmy finds himself hassled by a pack of ill-tempered rodeo clowns. --- When an emergency at Misery Inc. keeps Lucius from his date with Jez, he bribes Jimmy and Beezy to keep her occupied.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is fed up with Heloise and Beezy’s constant bickering, so he arranges a contest to see who can make nice. --- Jimmy has saved Lucius’ life, so Lucy must now scramble to endanger Jimmy’s life and return the favor.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jez wants Lucius to try a youthful new look, so Lucy tricks Jimmy into swapping hairstyles. --- When the ghost of pizza-crusts-past starts haunting Beezy, it’s up to Jimmy to make things right.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is jealous when he’s the only one in Miseryville who can’t grow a mustache. --- Beezy hires a butler to clean his room, but he soon has his new manservant living his entire life for him.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise and Beezy have a secret, and Jimmy will do anything to find out what it is—even if it means taking dance lessons from Rudolpho.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After breaking Lucius’s super-expensive vase, Jimmy and Beezy try to adjust to the outlaw life with notorious criminal Stink the Skunk.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An experimental “genius bolt” strikes Beezy, making him smarter than everyone else in Miseryville-– including Heloise.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Beezy rebels against his dad’s wishes and befriends a needy weevil named Max.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lucius commissions a high-powered jet to help spread doom and gloom across Miseryville, but the misery’s on him when Jimmy winds up behind the controls.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy and Beezy exploit Heloise’s new-found panda fan-base for their own financial gain.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Beezy finally shows a hint of his father’s industrious spirit and starts a business of his own— too bad he blows the family fortune on the very first day.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When a giant monster terrorizes Lucius, Power Squid and Spaghetti Beezy must team up with a bossy new superhero, Trouble Bubble Girl.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Millie brings home a strange, hairless cat and Coop discovers that his once happy life will never be the same again. // Coop defies Dad and stays up to watch a horror movie and finds that his home has been invaded by Zombie cats.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Old Lady Munson lays down the law; Coop is not to set foot in her yard // Kat ends up with a conditioning collar to curb his demanding meows.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop and Dennis build a tree fort to get some Kat and little sister-free time. // Millie sells a record number of Greenie Girl Cookies but the boxes keep disappearing and all fingers point to Coop.

programme.desc: Briana argues with her mom about Javi while recovering from surgery, Barb takes steps to protect Jenelle's kids, Kailyn finalizes custody with Jo, and Leah brings Ali for a sleep study.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole welcome their daughter Layne, Barbara grows concerned when Jenelle avoids filming, Leah's home floods, and Briana goes on a camping trip with her new flame.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Briana faces an emergency, Leah worries about Addie, Chelsea and Cole bring their new baby home, Kailyn plans her sister's baby shower, and Jenelle contemplates her future.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea learns that Aubree's father gave up custody of his other daughter, Jo files for child support from Kailyn, and Leah's new boyfriend Jason meets Corey.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan obliga a Paula a confesar sus sentimientos sin saber que ella esconde el secreto que enfrenta a Gaspar y José. Miguel y Sofía se encuentran en el granero de los del Monte, Modesto oye un ruido y, al no ver a nadie, los deja encerrados.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta tiene planes de sacar del medio a Paula engañándola con su doble cara. Juan quiere rehacer su vida junto a ella para olvidar a la mujer que realmente ama. Pedro tuvo la oportunidad para hacerle daño a Paula, pero no pudo y la salva.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta tiene mareos en presencia de Paula, por lo que se ve obligada a decirle que tiene cáncer y que se va a morir. Le pide guardar el secreto, pero Paula no quiere mentirle al hombre que ama. Emilio se encuentra con Sofía y quiere conquistarla.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan intenta convencer a Paula de su amor, pero ella prefiere sacrificarse al conocer la enfermedad de Julieta. Juan insiste en saber si algo le sucede. Emilio enfrenta a Esteban para exigirle que respete a Paula.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica está preocupada, pues sabe que Lucho no se fue de San Pedro. La señora Guerra lleva a Rodrigo al hospital y no deja de seducirlo. Lagarto sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no poder ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital. El comisionado besa a Antonia y Ricardo lo ve.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La luna de miel entre Verónica y Alejandro continúa intensa, pero se interrumpe cuando Irene se presenta en la junta de accionistas y los amenaza con un arma. El poder que Lucho ejerce sobre Irene es cada vez mayor. El Lagarto quiere hablar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene no logra matar a la Patrona. Verónica le ofrece no denunciarla, si deja que Alejandro visite a su hija. Luego termina con Alejandro, porque siente que se ha vuelto tan monstruosa como Antonia, capaz de todo por una venganza. Maxi queda libre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco firma los documentos que lo acreditan como el propietario de la fortuna de Eduvina Trueba, aunque Juan persuade a su hermano para evitar que arruine su vida con una mujer mayor que él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan obliga a Paula a confesar sus sentimientos sin saber que ella esconde el secreto que enfrenta a Gaspar y José. Miguel y Sofía se encuentran en el granero de los del Monte, Modesto oye un ruido y, al no ver a nadie, los deja encerrados.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Switzerland, teams are surprised with the first ever public U-turn vote, where racers have to vote in front of each other.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a bumpy ride in Split, Croatia and try not to get tongue-twisted reciting poetry while in motion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million on the line, the final four teams race through London. The team to cross the finish line first will be crowned the winners!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Riskiest Adventures
programme.desc: Join Jack for some of his favorite moments of heroism, bravery and lunacy, as he counts down his riskiest animal encounters ever. Sharks, alligators, lions and cobras are just a few of the animals joining in on this Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Today the mammals are taking over the Earth, sky, sea and even the Wild Countdown studio! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some special mammal species that have adapted to thrive in unique ways, like orcas, camels, marsupials, platypus and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Horses
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing equine experiences! From a horseback safari in Botswana and a dude ranch in Montana to retirement home for horses in Florida, Jack is saddling up for ten incredible horse encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack behind the scenes for some of his most memorable moments like getting pecked by an ostrich, tangling with a snake, taking fashion advice from a Samburu warrior, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits the exciting city of Los Angeles, where he meets up with some new friends, including his good pal Betty White! Come along as Jack makes a visit to a talk show with animals in tow.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as heads to the frontlines of wildlife conservation and meets the warriors working to save endangered species. Elephants, Rhinos, Bongo, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animals and Traditions
programme.desc: Today, meet Kenya’s Masai cattle herders, Thailand’s mahouts and their elephants, the cowboys down south in South America, plus many more cultured creatures on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Supreme Survivors
programme.desc: Whether it’s braving rough seas, extreme temperatures or rugged terrain, or knowing how to outwit an enemy, the creatures on today’s countdown are supremely adapted to survive the extremes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Australia
programme.desc: G’day mates, this countdown is heading Down Under to meet up with Australia’s rare and wonderful creatures! From dingoes and devils, to kangaroos and cassowaries, come along for an Australian odyssey as Jungle Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and his family as they immerse themselves in the jungles of Peru.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a trio of stories from North Carolina, Jack takes a llama trek through the Great Smokey Mountains, learns about a unique veterinary program at the North Carolina Zoological Park, and checks out some of the state's endangered wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen share a boating adventure exploring the animal-rich rainforest surrounding the Panama Canal, including Howler and Capuchin monkeys and the deadly Fer de Lance snake.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In the south of Israel, the Hannas look at saving wildlife in the desert. Jack visits an ornithologist restoring a natural habitat in order to maintain an important fly-way for migratory birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: Jungle Jack goes to the ends of the Earth to meet nature's most captivating creatures! Today, adventures from the frigid waters of South America to elephant country in Africa and all the way up to Alaska's Glacier Bay.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: On this adventure, Jack takes you on whirlwind trip, from his home at the Columbus Zoo, to some of his favorite destinations in Africa, Australia and Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Life in the Slow Lane
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is all about animals that know how to take it easy, from mellow mammals like manatees and koalas to relaxed reptiles like the giant Galapagos tortoise. Kick back, relax and take a ride in the slow lane!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Habitats High & Low
programme.desc: Come along on today’s adventure to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, Kenya’s Masai Mara, Panama’s Forest Canopy and many more amazing animal ecosystems, as Jack counts them down all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Emily Haywood (Marion Ross) returns for a second consecutive cruise as her affection for Captain Stubing grows and Larry Gatlin and the Gatlin Brothers try to help a teenage stowaway.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others have a difficult time assimilating into Alexandria; a new threat arises that could bring the group closer together.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria again with a threat that may be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a minor success, two members of the group are taken hostage; Carol struggles morally with the lengths she has gone to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Two separate groups leave Alexandria for supplies, and while both worry over the future of the community, they will face immediate danger.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
